Off Calendar Jul-07-2016 Continued To Feb-02-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Marine Engineering And Supply Company
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Michael E. Fox, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DAVID MAHAFFEY,
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant MARINE ENGINEERING AND SUPPLY COMPANY.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs shall recover damages from defendant MARINE ENGINEERING AND SUPPLY COMPANY in the amount of:

To Plaintiff, DAVID MAHAFFEY $110,000.00 in Economic Damages,
To Plaintiff, DAVID MAHAFFEY $300,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages,
Total Judgment of $410,000.00.

The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
